title: Junior SEO Specialist at Just Herbs

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Just Herbs
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!
